{{Infobox religious building

| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Tsukiyomi Aramitama Shrine'''|月読荒御魂宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tsukiyomi Aramitama Shrine'''|月読荒御魂宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 月読荒御魂宮
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Tsukiyomi Aramitama Shrine'''|月読荒御魂宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tsukiyomi Aramitama Shrine'''|月読荒御魂宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 月読荒御魂宮
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Tsukiyomi Aramitama Shrine'''|月読荒御魂宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]].
